_comment: Multi-Manager TEAMS-mode hooks (SABLE-amj.5) — APPEND to ~/.claude/settings.json when running the agent-teams topology (SABLE_TEAMS=1). Identical to settings-snippet.json EXCEPT the three poll-based messaging hooks are OMITTED: inbox-injection (PostToolUse:Bash), inbox-injection-precompact (PreCompact), and read-guard (PreToolUse:Bash). In teams mode coordination is live via SendMessage, so members wake on a teammate's message instead of polling for-X beads (clean cutover, AGENT-TEAMS-DESIGN.md decision 5 / section 4).
_install: Copy each entry under the matching event/matcher into your existing settings.json hooks block. Use this INSTEAD of settings-snippet.json when running SABLE_TEAMS=1.
_timeout_coupling: pre-push-rebase-test.sh has TWO timeouts that must stay in sync: the 'timeout' field here (ms) and the SABLE_PRE_PUSH_TEST_TIMEOUT env var (seconds). Default pairing: inner 60s test budget, outer 90000ms hook. See settings-snippet.json for the full note.
